title: Creature Compendium
description: Unleash new interesting creatures into your world with creature compendium!
body:
# ![CREATURE COMPENDIUM](https://i.imgur.com/v2L4cwE.png)



**📖About:**
Creature Compendium introduces two new mob types and expands on an already existing one, these are "Curses", "Beasts" and "Golems"

Each one with their own unique traits and gameplay differences, asides from one thing, they can all be tamed in one way or another.

For more information on all the new content added you can craft the Creature Compendium, a book that contains all the crucial

information about these new creatures that are now roaming your world!

![NEW-CREATURES-CREATURE-COMPENDIUM](https://i.imgur.com/wpPsdEq.png)
